body: Currently, specifying `slurm_gres=gpu:1` uses any GPU on the cluster, including the more expensive h200 options. This PR specifies the P100 gpu.
title: Specify GPU type in pipeline

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
Adds a compat for Oceananigans that should go in ClimaOcean / ClimaOcean should update for the latest Oceananigans release.

Disables 2 runs that don't have enough parameter memory on the P100 so they fail in CI.
